mapper.sql: ( (select count(1) from audit_library_folder child where child.parent_id = f.folder_id and child.del_flag = '0') + (select count(1) from audit_common_resource r where r.folder_id = f.folder_id and r.del_flag = '0') + (select count(1) from audit_task_resource tr where tr.folder_id = f.folder_id and tr.del_flag = '0') ) as file_count
mapper.select:
select f.folder_id, f.parent_id, f.folder_name, f.intro, f.visible_scope, f.top_flag, f.del_flag, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time, f.remark,
from audit_library_folder f
f.del_flag = '0'
and f.folder_name like concat('%', #{folderName}, '%')
and (f.parent_id is null or f.parent_id = 0)
and f.parent_id = #{parentId}
order by case f.top_flag when '1' then 0 else 1 end asc, f.folder_id asc

select f.folder_id, f.parent_id, f.folder_name, f.intro, f.visible_scope, f.top_flag, f.del_flag, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time, f.remark,
from audit_library_folder f where f.folder_id = #{folderId} and f.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into audit_library_folder (parent_id, folder_name, intro, visible_scope, top_flag, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values (#{parentId}, #{folderName}, #{intro}, #{visibleScope}, #{topFlag}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from audit_library_folder where folder_id in
#{folderId}

delete from audit_common_resource where folder_id in
#{folderId}

delete from audit_task_resource where folder_id in
#{folderId}
mapper.sql: select resource_id, document_name, folder_id, folder_name, storage_status, progress_text, creator, latest_modify_time, file_size, file_name, file_url, current_version_no, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from audit_common_resource
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0'
and (document_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or file_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and storage_status = #{storageStatus}
and (folder_id is null or folder_id = 0)
and folder_id = #{folderId}
and date_format(latest_modify_time, '%y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginLatestModifyTime}, '%y%m%d')
and date_format(latest_modify_time, '%y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endLatestModifyTime}, '%y%m%d')
order by latest_modify_time desc, resource_id asc
select version_id, resource_id, version_no, file_name, file_url, file_size, creator, create_time from audit_common_resource_version where resource_id = #{resourceId} order by version_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into audit_common_resource (document_name, folder_id, folder_name, storage_status, progress_text, creator, latest_modify_time, file_size, file_name, file_url, current_version_no, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values (#{documentName}, #{folderId}, #{folderName}, #{storageStatus}, #{progressText}, #{creator}, #{latestModifyTime}, #{fileSize}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{currentVersionNo}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})

insert into audit_common_resource_version (resource_id, version_no, file_name, file_url, file_size, creator, create_time) values (#{resourceId}, #{versionNo}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{creator}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: update audit_common_resource set folder_id = #{folderId}, folder_name = #{folderName}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where resource_id = #{resourceId}
update audit_task_resource set folder_id = #{folderId}, folder_name = #{folderName}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where resource_id = #{resourceId}
mapper.delete:
delete from audit_common_resource_version where resource_id in
#{resourceId}

delete from audit_common_resource where resource_id in
#{resourceId}
mapper.sql: select resource_id, file_no, file_name, archive_time, folder_id, folder_name, collect_status, preview_file_url, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from audit_task_resource
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0'
and (file_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or file_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and (folder_id is null or folder_id = 0)
and folder_id = #{folderId}
and collect_status = #{collectStatus}
and date_format(archive_time, '%y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginArchiveTime}, '%y%m%d')
and date_format(archive_time, '%y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endArchiveTime}, '%y%m%d')
order by archive_time desc, resource_id asc
mapper.delete:
delete from audit_task_resource where resource_id in
#{resourceId}
